The '''Thaereian system''' was a [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Star system/Legends|star system]] centered around a dying yellow [[Star/Legends|star]], near the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. [[Planet/Legends|Planets]] in the system included [[Odae Ripp]], [[Thaere Privo]], [[Zham Hlar]].<ref name="OT" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Over Thaere'' originally described the system as possessing three planets. However, one of Thaere Privo's moons, [[T-4]],<ref name="Mem" /> was mistakenly labeled as the fourth planet in the system by ''[[Trade and Trade Alike]]''.<ref name="TTA">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/livingforce/swlf20021031trade|text=Trade and Trade Alike}}</ref>
